name: Code Analyzer Skill
description: A template skill for analyzing code structure and patterns

prompts.name: analyze-structure
prompts.content: Analyze the code structure and identify key components, patterns, and potential issues.

prompts.name: detect-issues
prompts.content: Detect potential issues in the provided code including performance, security, and maintainability problems.

parameters.focusAreas: Comma-separated areas to focus on (e.g., performance, security)

examples.output: The class lacks type definitions and has no methods. Consider adding getters/setters and TypeScript types.
examples.explanation: Example of identifying code quality issues
